utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now check the final package:
1. destination – fully specified (city, country, region) ✅
2. travel_dates – clearly specified (specific range) ✅
3. transportation – includes flight details (airline, airports, class, dates, cost) ✅
4. accommodation – includes hotel name, type, rating, location, cost ✅
5. activities – includes name, duration, inclusions, cost ✅
6. additional_services – includes travel insurance and special requests, but lacks explicit costs ❌ (the format requires 'any extra services with costs')
7. total_budget – includes total cost, limit, currency, remaining ✅
Thus, 6 of 7 items are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination Lisbon, Portugal; transportation via Budget Airline in Economy Class; accommodation at Cityscape Hotel; an activity called Yoga & Walking Cultural Tour; and dining at Vegan Mediterranean Fine Dining. From the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 7; Budget Airline Economy Class corresponds to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class, which has a rating of 10; Cityscape Hotel has a rating of 6; the activity Yoga & Walking Cultural Tour combines Yoga Retreat (rating 10) and City Walking Tour (rating 9), so we map it to those two activities separately; and the restaurant Vegan Mediterranean Fine Dining best matches the Vegan Bistro (rating 10) given the vegan and Mediterranean description.
